name: EdgeChamfer.ChamferEndTypeEnum
summary: The end type of the edge chamfer.

enum_values.name: FULL
enum_values.summary: The chamfer continues to the end of the edge.

enum_values.name: STRAIGHT
enum_values.summary: The chamfer end is straight at the given point.

enum_values.name: BEVELLED
enum_values.summary: The chamfer end is bevelled at the given point.
